image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Fusion powers the Sun—so why can’t we capture it here?
Context visual: The secret? It’s all about creating the right conditions: extreme temperature and pressure.
Escalation visual: Fusion needs over 150 million degrees Celsius—hotter than the core of the Sun! Can you imagine that?
Evidence visual: Recent experiments have achieved net energy gain—big milestones—but commercial fusion is still years away.
Payoff visual: The DOE and ITER work tirelessly to conquer these challenges. Imagine a world powered by clean fusion energy!
Cta visual: Curious about the future of energy? Hit like and follow for more science insights!
